address: N8390 US Highway 12, Black River Falls, WI 54615
schedule: Seasonal, May through September; themed event weekends run Wednesday/Thursday through Sunday
hours: Office hours: 10:00 AM - 7:00 PM during season (May-October); after-hours arrivals by arrangement
about: Camp NCN is a 21+ adults-only clothing-optional campground on 52+ acres in rural West Central Wisconsin. It features themed weekend events, an indoor pavilion with bar and dance floor, a 3-acre pond with beach, and multiple adult fun rooms.

address: 2168 250th Ave County Rd N, Cushing, WI 54006
schedule: Seasonal, April through October; themed event weekends (Friday through Sunday, 3-day holiday weekends)
hours: Check-in: 3:00 PM - 9:00 PM; Cabin check-out: 12:00 PM; Camper check-out: 2:00 PM
about: Freedom Valley is a 21+ adults-only, LGBTQIA-friendly, clothing-optional campground in western Wisconsin near the Minnesota border. It offers tent sites, full hook-up RV sites, and cabins with themed weekend events throughout the season.

schedule: Events approximately once per month at various locations throughout Wisconsin
about: Jen's Social Networking is a Wisconsin-based lifestyle group that hosts themed hotel takeovers, bar takeovers, and private events about once a month for couples and singles. JSN has also acquired the Sapphires Group and provides a safe, no-pressure environment at all experience levels.

schedule: Events scheduled periodically; hotel takeovers, bowling events, bar takeovers, and annual group trip to Jamaica in March
about: Mars Shags Venus is a South Central Wisconsin social swing group based in Madison, focused on creating fun, no-pressure environments for all experience levels. They host hotel takeovers, bowling events, bar takeovers, and an annual group trip to Hedonism II in Jamaica.

schedule: Events scheduled periodically at various venues throughout Wisconsin (now operated under Jen's Social Networking)
about: Sapphires Group is a couples and select single females' lifestyle group that hosts events throughout Wisconsin. The group has been acquired by Jen's Social Networking and provides a safe, fun, no-pressure atmosphere for all experience levels.

address: 11400 W Silver Spring Dr, Milwaukee, WI
schedule: Events scheduled periodically; The Downlow nightclub open for ticketed events
hours: Varies by event; typical event hours 7:30 PM - 2:00 AM
about: Tasty Partys is a sex-positive events company producing lifestyle events in Milwaukee since 2006. They also operate The Downlow, a private swinger-centric nightclub at 11400 W Silver Spring Dr in Milwaukee.
